rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core problem is jointly modeling multiplex/multiple relationships, and the cited paper’s core construct is “relationship multiplexity” in supplier–customer dyads, making it a plausible conceptual/foundational prior rather than an incidental mention. The notes explicitly position the 2011 paper as extending prior marketing work on multiple ties, and this exact 2010 JMR article is directly matched by DOI (10.1509/jmkr.47.1.36).
